script:
set +e
echo '=== aixa-responder grep for LLM call ==='
grep -n -E 'subprocess|openai|anthropic|claude|api_key|x-api-key|messages.create' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo '=== aixa-responder lines 1-40 (imports + constants) ==='
sed -n '1,40p' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null
echo '=== aixa-responder grep for log/err path ==='
grep -n -E 'ERR_LOG|DEBUG_LOG|errors\.log|debug\.log|/home/azureuser/\.[a-z]+-bot' /home/azureuser/aixa-responder.py 2>/dev/null | head -20
echo '=== aixa bot dir contents ==='
ls -la /home/azureuser/.aixa-bot/ 2>/dev/null
echo '===END==='
